h2: Our industrial designers—hearth experts familiar with the latest home trends—match their suggested best fits to get the look you want in 10 popular interior design styles.
Enlight Pier Gas Fireplace from Stellar by Heat & Glo

paragraphs: Our industrial designers—hearth experts familiar with the latest home trends—match their suggested best fits to get the look you want in 10 popular interior design styles.
This style brings the natural elements of the coast inside your home. The fireplace can anchor white-washed woods, blue tones, and plenty of white to help that beachy sunshine bounce around the room.
Elevate two spaces at once with captivating fire that shines through. Consider these recommended features from our pros for a Coastal aesthetic:
A beautiful outdoor fire makes nature a living room. Create a Coastal look with these features our experts suggest:

Materials in their raw, unfinished form, such as exposed ductwork and concrete floors, are balanced with live dancing flames to create a confident, no-frills loft or urban sanctuary with utilitarian charm.
Add linear geometry to your industrial-themed space. Our designers recommend the following features to express this style in your hearth:
Ideal for a no-nonsense yet inviting décor, this popular model carries industrial charm. Our experts are fond of these features to bring an Industrial vibe to life:
The classic shape and authentic appeal rekindle the traditional focal point of the home. Consider humble, grounded, textured and aged materials, where you appreciate the story behind them.
Preserve living space with a mere 16"-deep firebox that adds comfort almost anywhere. Fashion a Modern Farmhouse feel with these choices that mesh with a home seeking the charm of a country retreat.
Masonry detailing creates a realistic look that fits well in this style, with two hearth walls to decorate. Here’s what our experts recommend making it Farmhouse-esque:

Pieces designed in this period have stood the test of time and remain fresh, modern and relevant. As this style is clean, simple and minimal, fit a fireplace that straddles contemporary and traditional.
With a clean profile and timeless proportions, the 8000 Modern gas fireplace matches this style. For an MCM vibe, we recommend these features along with a mantel of warm wood with purposeful details.

A fire feature with a high-end, polished feel can hold together this style, which is filled with luxe textiles like leather, suede and velvet in the very finest of finishes, as well as jewel-toned colors.
Make the ultimate dramatic statement with this eye magnet for opulent spaces. Make a Phoenix TrueView your own in a Glam aesthetic with these suggested features:
A masonry style warms up a glam vibe with the largest view in its class, serious heat and rustic elegance. Our industrial designers recommend the following to carry this style in your interior:

A style defined by functionality and ultra-clean lines calls for a fireplace that is streamlined, where less is more. A luxe linear presentation is ideal, where you can bring finishing materials up to the edge.

Classic shapes create authentic centerpieces for any interior. Architectural elements such as heavy trim work, stately panel doors and built-in cabinetry are at home with nostalgic rustic fireplace designs.
The arched Cerona turns heads with its cantilevered brick, accent lights, handcrafted iron and split logs. Our designers suggest these features to fit it naturally with a Traditional look and feel:
The clean finish of a modern linear fireplace enables you to bring organic materials like barnwood right to the edge as you layer neutral textures and textiles for a casual, inviting vibe.

Set the tone with a three-sided display that takes cues from nature. Style your organic mood look with these designer tips, which include a clean finish with wood right to the edge of the viewing area.
Explore our Inspiration Gallery to spark your imagination of what could fit your design vision.

The Mezzo linear gas fireplace features one of the cleanest designs in the industry, punctuated by end-to-end ribbon flames. A wide range of sizes and styles help make Mezzo yours – including trendy fire bed materials and timeless log sets – and heat-management options so you can enjoy the beauty of this linear fireplace near your TV. Available in 36-inch, 48-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.

Big interiors need a big fireplace. The True gas fireplace sets the standard in a traditional masonry style. Warm up the good times with the largest view in its class and serious heat. Truly extraordinary.

The best-selling 6K/8K gas fireplace pairs powerful performance with refined design that brings a striking focal point to your space. Getting the right look is simple: choose from three Design Packages – Modern Farmhouse, Organic Modern, or New Traditional – each offering a curated set of fireplace front, interior panels and logs designed to match your home style. And with thoughtful features like voice control and adjustable heat management, it’s easy to set the mood and enjoy the fire your way, year‑round.

Shape your atmosphere with our best combination of beauty and warmth. The smooth curves of the Cerona indoor gas fireplace give it a bigger presence. And, our patented FireBrick® supplies 25-percent more heat.

In a clean transitional look, draw people and your interior together. The Escape See-Through fireplace stands out with its huge opening and bold flames, adding architectural interest to multiple rooms.
Make the most of your space with the most fireplace for a slender 16” profile. The popular SlimLine gas fireplace is ideal for nestling into tight spots and adding extra comfort to your couch time.

Evoke an open-hearth experience so real, friends may ask to add another log to the fire. We pioneered the open gas fireplace with a large, glass-free view so you get the ultimate combination of authenticity and innovation. Mild heat settings allow for openness without feeling overheated, and you can even stream your tunes or the crackling of a fire through built-in Bluetooth speakers. Not available in Canada.

Bring warmth, light and intention to your outdoor space with the Lanai outdoor gas fireplace. A ribbon of flames dances across vibrant crushed glass, creating an atmosphere that feels equal parts refined and inviting. Crafted from rust-resistant stainless steel, the Lanai is built to perform beautifully in the elements, season after season. Choose from 48", 60" or 72" widths, with single- or double-sided configurations that adapt seamlessly to patios, terraces and open-air living spaces.

Create a fireside experience that complements your sleek style. Built-in heat management makes it safe to install your TV above this fireplace. Tailor it to your interior design style by choosing from a range of interior panels, fire bed materials, and hand-painted logs. Available in 48-inch, 60-inch and 72-inch widths.
Browse our photo gallery to find a fireplace design that reflects your unique style.
